summary: Bug fix verified: BUG-001 from iteration_33 is now FIXED. All three mileage-reading endpoints (/api/financials/mileage/2026, /api/financials/summary/2026, /api/financials/tax-prep/summary/2026) now return consistent mileage data (12.51 miles, $9.07 deduction) from gps_trips collection as single source of truth.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mileage consolidation is complete. All endpoints now read from gps_trips collection. The fix also includes backwards compatibility with legacy mileage_entries collection.

BUG-001.description: Financial summary endpoint /api/financials/summary/{year} now correctly reads mileage from gps_trips collection
